notes: Aldric runs the Monster Hunters Guild. Formal, military bearing, respects results over words. Issues bounties and tracks field reports.

greeting.text: Hunter. I'm glad you're here. The board has postings that need attention. What can I do for you?

responses.text: Tell me about the active bounties.
What do you know about the field?

bounties.text: Right now we need slime numbers reduced — they've been creeping toward the south road. Three confirmed kills earns a supply reward. Report back when you have results.

responses.text: What else is on the board?
What if I find something bigger out there?

more_bounties.text: Nothing confirmed yet, but there are reports of something unusual in the eastern reach. I won't post a bounty until I have better intelligence. If you stumble across it, stay cautious and come back with a description.

big_threat.text: Then you report it to me immediately. Don't engage something unknown alone. We brief, we plan, and then we hunt. That's how this guild has kept its hunters alive.

field_intel.text: The population is higher than normal this season. We don't know why yet. The slimes are typical enough, but the density is unusual. Stay in the western clearing until you're confident in your footing.

farewell.text: Come back with results, hunter. The board keeps score even when I don't say anything.
